meta.title: Dr. Jorge Arce — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery · v17 Everswap
meta.description: Surgery, restoration, and long-term care unified in one South Bay practice. Dr. Jorge Arce, board-certified oral & maxillofacial surgeon.

sections.title: Care at its peak.
sections.sub: Dr. Jorge Arce unifies surgery, restoration, and long-term care in a single practice — twenty-seven years on the complex cases other surgeons refer out.

cells.d: From single implants to full-arch All-On-X reconstruction — complex extractions, bone grafting, and the difficult cases other clinicians refer out.
Function first, then structure, then confidence. Rebuilding what was lost with structural precision — the smile is the last step, not the first promise.
Second opinions, honest judgment, long-term maintenance — and a full report back to your referring dentist, every time.

sections.quote: “The work is precise. The reason behind it is human.”
sections.attr: Dr. Jorge Arce — Founder, Dental Implants Center of South Bay

cards.q: “I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.”
“When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make. My patients always come back grateful — and so do I.”
“The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.”
“Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood. The result speaks for itself.”
“I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows.”
“I was terrified of the procedure. He never rushed me. Best decision I have made for my health.”
“Years of pain, gone. I only wish I had found him sooner. I recommend Dr. Arce to everyone I know.”
“Reliable, communicative, and surgically excellent. A full report back, every time.”
“The level of care and follow-up is rare. My patients trust him, and that trust reflects back on my practice.”

rows.ds: Your history, your scans, your questions — an unhurried first consultation.
Planned before anyone operates — the time the case actually needs.
Twenty-seven years of precision in the operating room.
Restoration, maintenance, and a full report to your referring dentist.

sections.title: Every case starts with an honest conversation.
sections.sub: Request a consultation or ask for the free guide — What to expect from your first implant consultation.
